name: Bodyweight Squat
cues: Full depth, drive through the whole foot
execution_steps: Stand with feet about shoulder-width and toes slightly turned out.
Reach your hips down and back, keeping your chest up and heels planted.
Descend to full depth with your knees tracking over your toes.
Drive through your whole foot to stand tall, then repeat.
good_when: You're a complete beginner learning the squat pattern before adding load.
You want warm-ups, high-rep finishers, or a home workout with no gear.
You're grooving depth and knee tracking.
bad_when: You need meaningful quad overload — bodyweight quickly becomes too easy.
You want measurable progressive load (use goblet or barbell squats).
